steps.title: Find the subject head noun
steps.content: The subject is researchers like Aliya Bhatia of the Center for Democracy and Technology. The head noun researchers is plural, so the verb must be plural.

steps.title: Use plural verb agreement
steps.content: A, B, and D use singular forms that do not agree with the plural subject. The plural present-tense verb fits researchers and completes the sentence naturally. The answer is C.
